CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EARL D. SMITH, INC. SMITH, EARL D. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: THE MARKET VALUE OF EQUIPMENT IS $13,000, RE DESCRIPTION OF THE EQUIPMENT, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH,, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $12,677.24 DAMAGES, $1,600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $370.00 COSTS, $242.90 INTERESTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,890.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-07-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
